findings.title: Attack surface summary
findings.detail:
groups: open=0, allowlist=1
tools.elevated: disabled
hooks.webhooks: disabled
hooks.internal: disabled
browser control: enabled
trust model: personal assistant (one trusted operator boundary), not hostile multi-tenant on one shared gateway

findings.title: Reverse proxy headers are not trusted
findings.detail: gateway.bind is loopback and gateway.trustedProxies is empty. If you expose the Control UI through a reverse proxy, configure trusted proxies so local-client checks cannot be spoofed.
findings.remediation: Set gateway.trustedProxies to your proxy IPs or keep the Control UI local-only.

findings.title: Filesystem tool policy does not make exec read-only
findings.detail:
Found scopes where write/edit/apply_patch are unavailable but exec remains available:
- agents.list.robocop.tools: runtime=[exec], disabledFs=[write, edit, apply_patch], exec.host=auto, sandbox=off, workspaceAccess=none
The exec tool is a shell and can still write files wherever the selected host or sandbox filesystem permits it.
findings.remediation: For read-only agents, deny exec and process too. If shell access is intentional, constrain the filesystem boundary with sandbox mode "all" and workspaceAccess "ro" or "none".

findings.title: Small models require sandboxing and web tools disabled
findings.detail:
Small models (<=300B params) detected:
- nvidia/llama-nemotron-rerank-vl-1b-v2:free (1B) @ agents.defaults.model.fallbacks (ok; sandbox=off; web=[off])
- google/gemma-4-31b-it:free (31B) @ agents.defaults.model.fallbacks (ok; sandbox=off; web=[off])
- nvidia/llama-nemotron-rerank-vl-1b-v2:free (1B) @ agents.list.main.model.fallbacks (ok; sandbox=off; web=[off])
- google/gemma-4-31b-it:free (31B) @ agents.list.main.model.fallbacks (ok; sandbox=off; web=[off])
- nvidia/llama-nemotron-rerank-vl-1b-v2:free (1B) @ agents.list.airdrop.model.fallbacks (ok; sandbox=off; web=[off])
- google/gemma-4-31b-it:free (31B) @ agents.list.airdrop.model.fallbacks (ok; sandbox=off; web=[off])
- nvidia/llama-nemotron-rerank-vl-1b-v2:free (1B) @ agents.list.trading.model.fallbacks (ok; sandbox=off; web=[off])
- google/gemma-4-31b-it:free (31B) @ agents.list.trading.model.fallbacks (ok; sandbox=off; web=[off])
- nvidia/llama-nemotron-rerank-vl-1b-v2:free (1B) @ agents.list.farmer.model.fallbacks (ok; sandbox=off; web=[off])
- google/gemma-4-31b-it:free (31B) @ agents.list.farmer.model.fallbacks (ok; sandbox=off; web=[off])
- nvidia/llama-nemotron-rerank-vl-1b-v2:free (1B) @ agents.list.polyclaw.model.fallbacks (ok; sandbox=off; web=[off])
- google/gemma-4-31b-it:free (31B) @ agents.list.polyclaw.model.fallbacks (ok; sandbox=off; web=[off])
- nvidia/llama-nemotron-rerank-vl-1b-v2:free (1B) @ agents.list.wp-claw.model.fallbacks (ok; sandbox=off; web=[off])
- google/gemma-4-31b-it:free (31B) @ agents.list.wp-claw.model.fallbacks (ok; sandbox=off; web=[off])
- nvidia/llama-nemotron-rerank-vl-1b-v2:free (1B) @ agents.list.pfa.model.fallbacks (ok; sandbox=off; web=[off])
- google/gemma-4-31b-it:free (31B) @ agents.list.pfa.model.fallbacks (ok; sandbox=off; web=[off])
- nvidia/llama-nemotron-rerank-vl-1b-v2:free (1B) @ agents.list.robocop.model.fallbacks (ok; sandbox=off; web=[off])
- google/gemma-4-31b-it:free (31B) @ agents.list.robocop.model.fallbacks (ok; sandbox=off; web=[off])
No web/browser tools detected for these models.
Small models are not recommended for untrusted inputs.
findings.remediation: If you must use small models, disable web_search/web_fetch/browser globally or for each small model with tools.byProvider["provider/model"].deny=["group:web","browser"]; use agents.defaults.sandbox.mode="all" for defense in depth.

findings.title: Potential multi-user setup detected (personal-assistant model warning)
findings.detail:
Heuristic signals indicate this gateway may be reachable by multiple users:
- channels.telegram.groupPolicy="allowlist" with configured group targets
Runtime/process tools are exposed without full sandboxing in at least one context.
Potential high-impact tool exposure contexts:
- agents.defaults (sandbox=off; runtime=[exec, process]; fs=[read, write, edit, apply_patch]; fs.workspaceOnly=true)
- agents.list.main (sandbox=off; runtime=[exec, process]; fs=[read, write, edit, apply_patch]; fs.workspaceOnly=true)
- agents.list.airdrop (sandbox=off; runtime=[exec, process]; fs=[read, write, edit, apply_patch]; fs.workspaceOnly=true)
- agents.list.trading (sandbox=off; runtime=[exec, process]; fs=[read, write, edit, apply_patch]; fs.workspaceOnly=true)
- agents.list.farmer (sandbox=off; runtime=[exec, process]; fs=[read, write, edit, apply_patch]; fs.workspaceOnly=true)
- agents.list.polyclaw (sandbox=off; runtime=[exec, process]; fs=[read, write, edit, apply_patch]; fs.workspaceOnly=true)
- agents.list.wp-claw (sandbox=off; runtime=[exec, process]; fs=[read, write, edit, apply_patch]; fs.workspaceOnly=true)
- agents.list.pfa (sandbox=off; runtime=[exec, process]; fs=[read, write, edit, apply_patch]; fs.workspaceOnly=true)
- agents.list.robocop (sandbox=off; runtime=[exec]; fs=[read]; fs.workspaceOnly=true)
OpenClaw's default security model is personal-assistant (one trusted operator boundary), not hostile multi-tenant isolation on one shared gateway.
findings.remediation: If users may be mutually untrusted, split trust boundaries (separate gateways + credentials, ideally separate OS users/hosts). If you intentionally run shared-user access, set agents.defaults.sandbox.mode="all", keep tools.fs.workspaceOnly=true, deny runtime/fs/web tools unless required, and keep personal/private identities + credentials off that runtime.

findings.title: Extensions exist but plugins.allow is not set
findings.detail: Found 1 extension(s) under /root/.openclaw/extensions. Without plugins.allow, any discovered plugin id may load (depending on config and plugin behavior).
findings.remediation: Set plugins.allow to an explicit list of plugin ids you trust.

findings.title: Extension plugin tools may be reachable under permissive tool policy
findings.detail:
Enabled extension plugins: graph-memory.
Permissive tool policy contexts:
- default
- agents.list.main
- agents.list.airdrop
- agents.list.trading
- agents.list.farmer
- agents.list.polyclaw
- agents.list.wp-claw
- agents.list.pfa
findings.remediation: Use restrictive profiles (`minimal`/`coding`) or explicit tool allowlists that exclude plugin tools for agents handling untrusted input.
